task_completion.description: Fiducial markers labeled 'Right' and 'Left' are placed at the hemidiaphragm apices on the CT scan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: 3D Slicer GUI showing axial, sagittal, or coronal views of a CT scan with two fiducial markers clearly labeled 'Right' and 'Left' positioned near the top of the diaphragm domes.

task_completion.description: Fiducial markers are saved to the specified JSON file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File explorer, terminal, or Slicer save dialog showing the file 'diaphragm_markers.mrk.json' located in the '~/Documents/SlicerData/AMOS/' directory.

task_completion.description: Report contains right dome position and vertebral level.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Content of 'diaphragm_report.json' (visible in a text editor or terminal output) containing the keys 'right_dome_vertebral_level' and 'right_dome_z_position_mm' with populated values.

task_completion.description: Report contains left dome position and vertebral level.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Content of 'diaphragm_report.json' (visible in a text editor or terminal output) containing the keys 'left_dome_vertebral_level' and 'left_dome_z_position_mm' with populated values.

task_completion.description: Report contains height and vertebral differences.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Content of 'diaphragm_report.json' containing the keys 'height_difference_mm', 'vertebral_level_difference', and 'right_higher_than_left' with populated values.

task_completion.description: Report contains contour assessment and clinical interpretation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Content of 'diaphragm_report.json' containing the keys 'contour_assessment' and 'clinical_interpretation' with populated text.

integrity.description: Agent used the 3D Slicer GUI to view the CT and place markers rather than just creating fake JSON files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the 3D Slicer application open with the CT loaded and markers actively being placed or viewed in the 2D/3D viewers.

integrity.description: The report values appear to be derived from actual measurements rather than hardcoded dummy values.
integrity.visual_evidence: The z-position values in the report JSON are specific floating-point numbers (e.g., -152.4) rather than placeholders like 0.0 or 'insert_value_here'.

integrity.description: Files are saved in the exact requested directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal paths, text editor paths, or file explorer windows confirming the '~/Documents/SlicerData/AMOS/' directory is used for both output JSON files.
